response.justification: While Sarah demonstrates strong distributed systems and geospatial domain knowledge through her work at Dunnhumby and as founder of GISCollective, her C++ experience is over a decade old, and her current expertise is heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js full-stack development. The position requires modern C++ as a primary skill, which represents a significant capability gap. Her proven adaptability and willingness to learn are positives, but would require substantial ramp-up time on the critical technical requirements.
strengths: Deep geospatial domain knowledge through GISCollective founder experience and Green Map Association work
Proven ability to work on distributed systems at scale (Dunnhumby: millions of requests per second)
Strong problem-solving mindset and demonstrated adaptability across multiple programming languages and platforms
concerns: C++ experience is over a decade old (2014-2015) and predates modern C++ standards; current career focus is TypeScript/Node.js
No specific experience with routing data pipelines, navigation systems, or tile generation optimization
Career pattern shows breadth across many domains rather than deep systems programming expertise needed for production routing infrastructure
